title: External Secrets Provider API Errors
description: This monitor alerts when API calls to external secret providers are failing, indicating connectivity or authentication issues.

definition.name: [External Secrets] Provider API Errors for {{provider.name}} ({{call.name}})
definition.message:
Provider `{{provider.name}}` is returning errors for API call `{{call.name}}`. This indicates connectivity or authentication issues with the external secret provider.

To resolve:
1. Verify the provider credentials in the SecretStore
2. Check network connectivity to the provider API
3. Review provider API rate limits
